dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block F Import / Export Permits and Border Controls
purpose: Mock/reference border-control rules matrix aligned with Block C airport countries for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Customs, SPS, pharma, CITES and other border rules change and are commodity-specific. Final validation by customs broker, carrier, importer, and competent authority is required before real shipment.
integration_note: Run Block F after cargo category classification from Blocks A/B and airport-country mapping from Block C. If a rule applies and required permit/certificate/prior notification is unknown, cap confidence and ask for manual customs/authority validation.
